title: Generalized worry documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports documenting severe functional impairment, self-harm or suicide risk, substance misuse, self-neglect, treatment history, home and community support, family impact, referral, and collaborative care planning.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-completed high-risk assessment for generalized worry; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting severe functional impairment, self-harm or suicide risk, substance misuse, self-neglect, treatment history, home and community support, family impact, referral, and collaborative care planning.

treatment_and_management.text: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports worry, duration, distress, function, comorbidity and monitoring for generalized worry; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports anxiety and worry history, duration, distress, functional impairment, comorbid depression or anxiety, substance use, medical and treatment history, education, and active monitoring.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Worry domains, controllability, duration, physical symptoms, avoidance, function, comorbidity, mental state, risk, diagnosis and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for generalized worry.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
